title: Naruto new shinobi era
body: Naruto: New Shinobi Era is the most feature-complete Naruto mod for modern Minecraft. Built for Forge 1.20.1, it features 160+ jutsu across all 5 nature transformations and Kekkei Genkai *(Amaterasu, Chidori, Rasengan, Susanoo and more)*, 7 playable clans with unique mechanics, every canonical Mangekyo Sharingan, Rinnegan, Tenseigan — and full server multiplayer support. __**IMPORTANT REQUIREMENT:**__ [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions) __**IMPORTANT REQUIREMENT FOR 1.1.0+:**__ [AAA Particles](https://modrinth.com/mod/aaa-particles) __**IMPORTANT REQUIREMENT FOR 1.2.0+:**__ [TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender) __**RECOMMENDED:**__ [Configured](https://modrinth.com/mod/configured) --- ### The mod features: **1\. Akatsuki Bosses** Face enemies that will challenge even the strongest shinobi — each with unique behavior faithful to the anime: * Itachi * Kisame * Kakuzu * Hidan * Konan * Pain (more paths coming) * Obito (Tobi) * Deidara ![Akatsuki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24a1731125ad5dd2716ddc3045c6db034fa87b30.png) More characters from the original anime are planned for future updates. **2\. Structures** Explore hand-crafted buildings inspired by the Naruto world: * 2 buildings from Konoha * 1 building from the Hidden Sand Village * 1 building from the Hidden Stone Village (Iwa) * 1 building from Kuni Village * Mount Myoboku (Sage Mode location) **3\. Jutsu & Techniques** 40+ techniques across all 5 nature transformations and Kekkei Genkai — Amaterasu, Chidori, Rasengan, Susanoo, Mokuton, Chibaku Tensei and more. New jutsu are added with every update. ![Techniques](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/994b754d149050ac132176461d656dd3507232bc.png) **4\. Clans** Choose your clan — or let destiny decide. Unlike other mods, the clan selection is fully transparent: you always know exactly what you're getting. 7 clans are currently implemented: * Uzumaki * Hyuga * Uchiha * Hozuki * Otsutsuki * Namikaze * Senju ![Clans](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0b52633031714ca30219c8611525370bc11e633_0.webp) Each clan has unique bonuses — extra chakra, special Kekkei Genkai, or combat advantages. Special attention has been paid to multiplayer balance: even the Uchiha don't dominate — every clan has a fair chance to win. **5\. Dojutsu** Every canonical Mangekyo Sharingan from the anime is implemented, plus all original and fan-made Eternal Mangekyo Sharingan — each with their own techniques. The Byakugan is fully present with its evolution into the Golden Byakugan. The Rinnegan, Rinne Sharingan, and Tenseigan are also available, complete with all their techniques. ![Dojutsu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b013dcb06d2dc7f2809f20aad5e5fdb6021ccded.png) --- ## ⚠️ **OptiFine is NOT supported.** Using OptiFine will cause crashes or broken visuals. Use **Embeddium** (performance) + **Oculus** (shaders) instead — better FPS and full compatibility guaranteed. --- **6\. FAQ** Q: How do I get Chakra? A: Craft 1 Shuriken and 1 Kunai to earn the SHINOBI achievement and unlock Chakra. ![SHINOBI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7c1a0324bda34db1c0534e4da693cc8531a8d12.png) ![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86fc74a303cdd175eda4dcaa27f8b3177f05bbca.png) ![shuriken craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c773f73d8e22798de39d07845d809893e94036db.png) ![kunai craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/594f1cc4cae5f0b9722047a8a640caf70e4b5832.png) Q: How do I awaken Kekkei Genkai / Clan Eyes? A: Reach 1000 Chakra. After that, there is a random chance to awaken it every tick. Q: Are there stat bonuses for Chakra levels? A: Yes. For every 1000 Chakra (up to 20,000): +5 HP, +1 ATK, +1 Armor Toughness, +0.5 Armor. Bonuses are halved after 20,000. Q: How do I farm Chakra? A: Hit mobs or take damage. It's that simple. Q: How do I learn Jutsu? A: Find scrolls inside mod structures. You also receive 1 random jutsu automatically at the start. Q: How do I awaken the Mangekyo Sharingan? A: Use a Command Scroll with a friend. Both right-click it, stay within 5 blocks, and witness their death to awaken your MS. Q: How do I upgrade the Byakugan? A: Use the 64 Palms technique 1000 times — takes about a few tens of minutes of active play. Q: How do I become a Sage? A: Find the Mount Myoboku structure in the world. Q: How do I become a Jinchuriki? A: Via command until v1.5.0: `/ninja jinchuriki set ` Q: How do I get the Rinnegan or Tenseigan? A: Eat a Chakra Fruit (currently Creative Mode only). Q: Can I run this on a server? A: Yes, server support has been available since v0.6.1.1. Q: How do I switch techniques? A: Hold an element item and press **Z** (next) or **L.Alt** (previous). Q: Is Chakra saved on death? A: Yes, by default. Disable with `/gamerule ChakraDeathSave false`. Q: How do I use Jutsu? A: Find scroll → Study it (right-click) → Select jutsu → Hit mobs with the element item. Higher damage = more XP. Q: How do I open the config? A: Install Configured, then find the mod in the Mods menu and click "Settings". Q: How fast are bugs fixed? A: Bugfix patches every week. Visual/texture updates every ~2 weeks. Q: When is the next major update? A: Major updates release every 1–3 months depending on scope. Q: I found a bug — where do I report it? A: In the tickets channel on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/bB28R9kxYF). [![boosty](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb8b24f4fc245fbb799e64025594ce80048c06ea_0.webp)](https://boosty.to/likozell) [![patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e2598c389a1da0ee1bcde1bd5cf37aa032e7905.png)](https://www.patreon.com/c/likozell)
